sentence_reviews.text: Local update rules change connections from pre/post activity, errors, correlation, or spike timing without general end-to-end backpropagation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Khacef et al. 2022 abstract and survey description: spike-based local plasticity, pre/post-synaptic locality principle, online neuromorphic learning; AIMA contents Chapters 19 and 21 for learning/deep learning background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The local pre/post and spike-timing portions are directly supported by the inspected survey abstract. The combined list also includes perceptron-style error updates, so synthesis is safer than verified.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity is to connect Linear algebra, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences to downstream capabilities including Perceptrons & single-layer neural classifiers, Self-organizing maps & competitive learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents: mathematical background, learning from examples, deep learning; Khacef et al. 2022 abstract: local plasticity supports neuromorphic learning.
sentence_reviews.notes: The ingredients and downstream areas are plausible, but the inspected evidence does not directly establish this full graph-derived role statement.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Perceptrons & single-layer neural classifiers
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents: Chapter 19 Learning from Examples and Chapter 21 Deep Learning; no directly inspected perceptron subsection text.
sentence_reviews.notes: Perceptron learning is a standard local/error-driven update example, but the inspected source pointer is too broad for direct verification.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Self-organizing maps & competitive learning
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Khacef et al. 2022 abstract discusses local spike-based learning and neuromorphic systems; AIMA contents provides broad learning background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Local plasticity is related to competitive/self-organizing learning, but the inspected evidence does not directly mention self-organizing maps.

sentence_reviews.text: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Linear algebra, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents: learning chapters and mathematical background; no inspected passage about this specific limitation for local plasticity.
sentence_reviews.notes: The generic limitation may be reasonable, but the cited evidence does not support the exact sentence or dependency list.

sentence_reviews.text: Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity uses Linear algebra as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents: Appendix A Mathematical Background and learning chapters.
sentence_reviews.notes: Weights/vectors make the dependency defensible, but the inspected evidence is only a broad textbook pointer.

sentence_reviews.text: Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity uses Labels, targets, rewards & preferences as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents: Learning from Examples; Khacef et al. 2022 abstract emphasizes local spike-based learning, not labels/preferences.
sentence_reviews.notes: Perceptron error updates use targets, but Hebbian/Oja/STDP can be unsupervised. Wording overgeneralizes across all listed rules.

sentence_reviews.text: Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity uses Neuroscience & cognitive science as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Khacef et al. 2022 abstract: brain-inspired synaptic plasticity models, biological neural networks, neuromorphic circuits.
sentence_reviews.notes: The inspected survey directly grounds spike-based local plasticity in biological/brain-inspired synaptic mechanisms.

sentence_reviews.text: Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Khacef et al. 2022 abstract: spike-based learning rules and pre/post-synaptic timing information.
sentence_reviews.notes: STDP depends on event timing, but the dependency is not equally core to perceptron, Hebbian, and Oja rules.

edge_reviews.notes: Linear algebra is plausible for weight-vector update rules, but only broad textbook evidence was inspected.
Some listed rules use labels/errors, but Hebbian/Oja/STDP are often unsupervised or locally self-organized; common strength is only partly defensible.
Brain-inspired synaptic plasticity and local pre/post information directly support this uses edge as common.
Spike timing supports the edge for STDP, but the node label aggregates non-temporal local rules too.
